required: SlicingPrior vector does not match normalized positional fallback
SlicingHybridPrior parses at least one CASES case vector
prompt plus 512 generated tokens fits context

purpose: Tokenizer-exact inference gate for the prepared long-code CodeSteer variants; all denominator records are retained here regardless of decision.

criteria.acceptance: both frozen sources compile and run without timeout; runtime exit 0 and empty stderr; both outputs trimmed-exact to oracle and to each other
criteria.output_line_definition: len(str.splitlines()); terminal newline adds no line
criteria.public_tests_policy: not loaded, inspected, ranked, or selected
criteria.runtime_comparator: replace CRLF with LF, then outer strip; internal whitespace exact

metadata.denominator_disclosure: The exact 25 frozen source/obfuscation variants are reused, so the screened-source denominator remains 25; supplemental cases are repeated measurements, not new source-level observations.
metadata.outcome_blind_disclosure: The rules were fixed and cases were selected without reading or using any model response, score, or other model outcome; this preparer performs no model inference.
metadata.purpose: runner-compatible outcome-blind supplemental tests for the frozen 25-source long-code screen
metadata.timing_disclosure: This expansion was designed after the initial 25-source full screen had started but before that screen completed.
